message:
refactor: rename bootstrap-prefixed functions to root-prefixed

- loadBootstrapAgents -> loadRootAgents
- readBootstrapDir -> readRootDir
- findBootstrapToolsDir -> findRootToolsDir
- initFromBootstrap -> initFromRoot
- syncBootstrap -> syncRoot
- loadAgentToolsWithBootstrap -> loadAgentToolsWithRoot
- SyncBootstrapResult -> SyncRootResult

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
